expectations.text: hook-file-exists: order query 훅 파일이 존재한다
hook-use-prefix: query 훅 이름이 useGet 접두사를 사용한다
expectations.evidence: Hook is named useGetOrderDetail, which starts with useGet

expectations.text: hook-in-apis-queries: 훅 경로가 hooks/apis/{domain}/queries 패턴을 따른다

expectations.evidence: File is at hooks/apis/order/queries/useGetOrderDetail/index.ts, matching the exact pattern

expectations.text: arrow-function: 훅이 화살표 함수로 정의된다 (shared profile: function style = arrow)
expectations.evidence: Hook defined as 'const useGetOrderDetail = (params: UseGetOrderDetailParams = {}) => {' — arrow function

expectations.text: returns-loading: 훅 반환값에 loading/isLoading 상태가 포함된다
returns-error: 훅 반환값에 error 상태가 포함된다
expectations.evidence: Return object includes isError: query.isError and error: query.error

expectations.text: no-logic-in-page: page에서 직접적인 fetch/business logic이 없고 훅 소비만 한다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx only imports and calls useGetOrderDetail hook; no direct fetch calls or business logic present
